things.name: Kachikally Crocodile Pool
things.description: Sacred crocodile pool where 80+ Nile crocodiles live alongside humans - you can touch them

things.name: Kunta Kinteh Island (James Island)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage slave fort - birthplace of Alex Haley's Roots

things.name: Abuko Nature Reserve
things.description: West Africa's smallest but most accessible nature reserve with monitor lizards and bushbuck

things.name: Albert Market, Banjul
things.description: Gambia's oldest market with batik fabric, carved masks and groundnut products

things.name: Bijilo Forest Park
things.description: Coastal forest with red colobus monkeys and 300+ bird species

things.name: Arch 22 Monument
things.description: Triumph arch marking the 1994 coup with panoramic views from the top

things.name: Serekunda Market
things.description: The biggest market in Gambia - an assault on all senses

things.name: River Gambia Boat Trip
things.description: Cruise the River Gambia to see hippos, baboons and extraordinary bird life

things.name: Senegambia Strip (Kololi)
things.description: The Gambia's tourist strip of beach bars, live African music and craft markets

things.name: Domoda (Groundnut Stew)
things.description: The national dish - chicken or beef in a rich groundnut (peanut) paste
